compiled_state.title: Add debug.max_fix_validate_cycles config key to dso-config.conf
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add the debug.max_fix_validate_cycles configuration key to .claude/dso-config.conf with default value 3.

**File**: `.claude/dso-config.conf`

**Implementation**: Add a new section for debug configuration:
```
# Debug — debug-everything validation loop settings
# Maximum number of fix→validate cycles before stopping.
# Default: 3
debug.max_fix_validate_cycles=3
```

This task is independently committable — the key is inert until the validation loop reads it.

**Test-exempt justification**: Static config file with no conditional logic; the test in task e98c-da8c covers config key presence and value. Meets all three unit exemption criteria: no conditional logic, change-detector only, infrastructure-boundary-only.

### Files to modify
- EDIT: `.claude/dso-config.conf`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Config key exists in dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'debug.max_fix_validate_cycles' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Default value is 3
  Verify: grep 'debug.max_fix_validate_cycles' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf | grep -q '=3'
